# IBEX Harness

> Self-hosted LLM proxy with persistent agent memory, context assembly, and behavioral drift detection for AI agents at scale.

IBEX Harness is an open-source (MIT) platform for teams running AI agents in production. The product site, documentation, blog, releases, benchmarks, and roadmap all live on ibexharness.com.

## Canonical URLs

| Property | URL |
|----------|-----|
| Home | https://ibexharness.com/ |
| Docs introduction | https://ibexharness.com/docs/getting-started/introduction |
| Architecture | https://ibexharness.com/docs/architecture/overview |
| API reference | https://ibexharness.com/docs/api-reference/chat-completions |
| Blog | https://ibexharness.com/blog |
| Benchmarks | https://ibexharness.com/benchmarks |
| Releases / changelog | https://ibexharness.com/releases |
| Roadmap | https://ibexharness.com/roadmap |
| Source (GitHub) | https://github.com/Rick1330/ibex-harness |
| License (MIT) | https://github.com/Rick1330/ibex-harness/blob/main/LICENSE |

## Sitemap

- https://ibexharness.com/sitemap.xml

## AI / crawler files

- LLM context: https://ibexharness.com/llms.txt
- Crawler policy: https://ibexharness.com/ai.txt

## Product summary

- **What it is:** A Go LLM proxy + auth service that intercepts OpenAI-compatible API calls.
- **Who it's for:** Engineering teams deploying AI agents with multi-tenant isolation requirements.
- **Phase 1 (shipped):** Proxy ingress, auth gRPC validation, per-org Redis rate limiting.
- **Phase 2+ (roadmap):** Memory extraction/retrieval, context assembly per request, drift detection.
- **Stack:** Go (proxy, auth), PostgreSQL, Redis; Python services planned for memory/context.
- **License:** MIT — fully open source.

## Home page sections (ibexharness.com/)

- #overview — hero and value proposition
- #features — proxy, auth, rate limits, memory-ready path
- #flow — request path from agent to provider
- #metrics — verified platform facts
- Internal links to /docs, /blog, /releases, /roadmap, /benchmarks

## Legacy subdomain

https://docs.ibexharness.com permanently redirects to https://ibexharness.com with the same path.

## Preferred citations

Use the name **IBEX Harness**. Link to https://ibexharness.com/ for product overview or https://ibexharness.com/docs/getting-started/introduction for technical onboarding.
